sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Property Portfolio & Strategic Positioning
required_elements: Property type composition and geographic diversification
Tenant mix, lease structure, and concentration risk
Portfolio occupancy rate and property quality assessment
Development pipeline and redevelopment yield visibility

sections.title: NOI Growth & Dividend Sustainability
required_elements: Same-store NOI growth and organic rent growth drivers
Lease expiration maturity schedule and re-leasing spread timing
FFO and AFFO calculations with payout ratio assessment
Interest rate sensitivity and refinancing schedule impact

sections.title: Cap Rate Compression/Expansion & Valuation
required_elements: Portfolio-weighted cap rate and market comparison
Net Asset Value (NAV) per share and premium/discount analysis
P/FFO and P/AFFO valuation multiples vs. peers
Cost of equity and WACC sensitivity to rate changes

sections.title: Balance Sheet & Refinancing Risk
required_elements: Leverage metrics (debt/EBITDA, LTV) and target ratios
Debt maturity profile and refinancing schedule
Debt covenant compliance and headroom monitoring
Capital markets access and equity dilution risk

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Sector-specific structural headwinds and demand sustainability
Interest rate sensitivity and refinancing cost headwind
Tenant concentration and lease rollover risk
Dividend sustainability and payout ratio stress testing

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Lease rollover economics and same-store NOI growth scenarios
Interest rate and refinancing cost stress testing
NAV valuation cycle positioning and cap rate sensitivity
